mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_social_accounts ( user_id, oauth_provider, provider_user_id, provider_email, provider_display_name, linked_at, last_login_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{oauthProvider}, #{providerUserId}, #{providerEmail}, #{providerDisplayName}, #{linkedAt}, #{lastLoginAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT social_account_id, user_id, oauth_provider, provider_user_id, provider_email, provider_display_name, linked_at, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at FROM user_social_accounts WHERE oauth_provider = #{oauthProvider} AND provider_user_id = #{providerUserId}

SELECT u.user_id, u.email, u.password_hash, u.display_name, u.role, u.enabled, u.last_login_at, u.created_at, u.updated_at FROM user_social_accounts sa INNER JOIN users u ON u.user_id = sa.user_id WHERE sa.oauth_provider = #{oauthProvider} AND sa.provider_user_id = #{providerUserId}

SELECT social_account_id, user_id, oauth_provider, provider_user_id, provider_email, provider_display_name, linked_at, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at FROM user_social_accounts WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY linked_at ASC, social_account_id ASC
